server_path.markdownDescription:
The path to the server binary to use for starting the language server. Use `auto` for the package to manage (install/update) server automatically.

> [!NOTE]
> Change this instead of directly updating `command` - the `${server_path}` variable is dynamically resolved based on this setting.

> [!WARNING]
> Using custom binary could result in package settings not matching what server supports.

logLevel.markdownDescription: Controls the log level of the language server.

logFile.markdownDescription: Path to the log file for the language server.

statusText.markdownDescription: The (Jinja2) template of the status bar text which is inside the parentheses `(...)`. See https://jinja.palletsprojects.com/templates/

ty.completions.autoImport.markdownDescription: Whether to include auto-import suggestions in code completions. That is, code completions will include symbols not currently in scope but available in your environment.

ty.completions.completeFunctionParenthes.markdownDescription: Whether accepting a function, method, or class completion also inserts parentheses and places the cursor inside them.

ty.disableLanguageServices.markdownDescription: Whether to disable all language services for ty like completions, hover, goto definition, etc.

enumDescriptions: Analyzes and reports errors on only open files.
Analyzes and reports errors on all files in the workspace.

ty.inlayHints.variableTypes.markdownDescription: Whether to enable inlay hints for variable types.

ty.inlayHints.callArgumentNames.markdownDescription: Whether to enable inlay hints for call argument names.

ty.showSyntaxErrors.markdownDescription:
Whether to show syntax error diagnostics.

This is useful when using ty with other language servers, allowing the user to refer to syntax errors from only one source.
